meta.title: SEEK NZ 绿名单岗位追踪
meta.description: 每日自动扫描 SEEK NZ 邮件中的绿名单 Tier1 ICT 岗位

tier1_jobs.title: Security Support & Systems Administrator
tier1_jobs.immigration_path: 绿名单Tier1 Straight to Residence | 262113 Systems Administrator — 有offer即可直申居留
tier1_jobs.suggested_skills: 1)英文简历突出具体技术栈(Python/SQL/Cloud/Security)；2)GitHub作品集；3)准备NZ本地面试题；4)NZQA IQA学历评估

all_jobs.title: Security Support & Systems Administrator
all_jobs.immigration_path: 绿名单Tier1 Straight to Residence | 262113 Systems Administrator — 有offer即可直申居留
all_jobs.suggested_skills: 1)英文简历突出具体技术栈(Python/SQL/Cloud/Security)；2)GitHub作品集；3)准备NZ本地面试题；4)NZQA IQA学历评估
